summary: Iteration 2 full-stack regression: 11/11 backend pytest cases passed (root, avatars maya/sofia/aria + 404, /chat for all 3 personas + 404, purchases create+get with persistence, saved-jobs full POST/GET/DELETE flow, no _id leakage). Frontend Playwright run on mobile viewport (390x844) executed 25 critical flow checks — every one PASSED with 0 page errors. Verified: home loads, install-btn alert, hero-cta-primary scroll to avatars, avatar tap -> /chat with intro bubble, chat input/send/mic/close, service-card-0 -> /checkout, payment method toggle (stripe/paypal), pay-btn -> success state -> start-session-btn -> /chat, bundle-0 -> checkout, trust-privacy modal + close, account tabs (purchases/saved), save-demo-job-btn adds an item (DB persisted), sign-in modal -> Sign out toggle, bottom-nav-aria updates sticky CTA, sticky-cta -> chat, demo-send-btn routes to /chat?avatar=sofia, final-start-btn scroll. App is functioning end-to-end as specified.

issues: Console warns 'shadow*' style props are deprecated on web — purely cosmetic; consider migrating to boxShadow via Platform.select web branch (already partially done in cardShadow). Non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: useNativeDriver not supported on web — falls back to JS animations, no functional impact.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Replace remaining shadow* style props with boxShadow on web to silence deprecation warnings.

(Optional) package.json: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 vs expected 2.2.0 and expo-linear-gradient@55.0.13 vs expected ~15.0.8 — currently working but Expo flags compatibility; consider aligning if issues appear.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean, async, uses uuid + ISO datetimes, excludes _id in find queries. Good.
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly; testIDs present on every interactive element required by the spec.
index.tsx is large (~1260 lines) — could be split into smaller section components for maintainability, but functionally correct.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed purchases and saved-jobs records during pytest; saved-job test deletes its record. Frontend tests created 1 sample saved job and 1 purchase via the live UI under guest user_id stored in browser AsyncStorage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has /api/, /api/avatars/{maya|sofia|aria}, /api/chat (POST), /api/purchases (POST, GET ?user_id=), /api/saved-jobs (POST, GET ?user_id=, DELETE /{id}?user_id=). All return JSON with 'id' (no _id). Frontend testIDs verified: install-btn, hero-cta-primary, avatar-{maya|sofia|aria}, service-card-0..29, bundle-0..2, trust-{privacy|deletion|payments|honest}, trust-modal-close, account-tab-{purchases|saved}, save-demo-job-btn, signin-btn, signin-name-input, signin-confirm, sticky-cta, bottom-nav-{maya|sofia|aria}, demo-chat-input, demo-send-btn, demo-mic-btn, final-start-btn, chat-input, chat-send-btn, chat-mic-btn, chat-close-btn, pay-method-{stripe|paypal}, pay-btn, start-session-btn.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found in this iteration. Implementation matches spec; both layers integrate cleanly via EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL.
